ddls:
CREATE TABLE "wells" (
  "well_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each well */,
  "well_name" TEXT /* Name of the well */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the well */,
  "well_depth" REAL /* Total depth of the well */,
  "well_status" TEXT /* Current status of the well */,
  "drilling_date" TEXT /* Date when the well was drilled */,
  "operator" TEXT /* Company or entity operating the well */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("well_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "formations" (
  "formation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each formation */,
  "formation_name" TEXT /* Name of the formation */,
  "formation_depth" REAL /* Depth at which the formation starts */,
  "formation_thickness" REAL /* Thickness of the formation */,
  "formation_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the formation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("formation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_types" (
  "test_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test type */,
  "test_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the test type */,
  "test_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the test type */,
  "test_equipment" TEXT /* Equipment used for the test */,
  "test_duration" REAL /* Duration of the test in hours */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orientations" (
  "orientation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each orientation */,
  "orientation_name" TEXT /* Name of the orientation */,
  "orientation_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the orientation */,
  "orientation_angle" REAL /* The angle of the orientation in degrees */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("orientation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the group */,
  "group_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the group */,
  "group_properties" TEXT /* Key properties associated with the group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "well_id" INTEGER /* ID of the well where the measurement was taken */,
  "formation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the formation where the measurement was taken */,
  "test_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test type used */,
  "orientation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the orientation of the test */,
  "measured_depth" REAL /* Depth at which the measurement was taken */,
  "tensile_strength" REAL /* Tensile strength of the rock at the measured depth */,
  "bulk_density" REAL /* Bulk density of the rock at the measured depth */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date when the measurement was taken */,
  "measurement_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the measurement */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the group associated with the measurement */,
  "test_equipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment used for the test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_formation_id FOREIGN KEY ("formation_id") REFERENCES formations ("formation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_test_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_equipment_id") REFERENCES test_equipment ("test_equipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_well_id FOREIGN KEY ("well_id") REFERENCES wells ("well_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_test_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_type_id") REFERENCES test_types ("test_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES groups ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_orientation_id FOREIGN KEY ("orientation_id") REFERENCES orientations ("orientation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "round_depths" (
  "round_depth_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each round depth */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement associated with the round depth */,
  "round_depth" REAL /* Round depth of the measurement */,
  "round_depth_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the round depth */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("round_depth_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_round_depths_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the measurement */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the measurement was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user when accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement associated with the version */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the version */,
  "version_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurement_versions_version_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurement_versions_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "formation_types" (
  "formation_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each formation type */,
  "formation_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the formation type */,
  "formation_type_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the formation type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("formation_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "formation_measurements" (
  "formation_measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each formation measurement */,
  "formation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the formation associated with the measurement */,
  "formation_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the formation type associated with the measurement */,
  "measured_depth" REAL /* Depth at which the measurement was taken */,
  "tensile_strength" REAL /* Tensile strength of the formation at the measured depth */,
  "bulk_density" REAL /* Bulk density of the formation at the measured depth */,
  "formation_measurement_date" TEXT /* Date when the measurement was taken */,
  "formation_measurement_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the formation measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("formation_measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_formation_measurements_formation_id FOREIGN KEY ("formation_id") REFERENCES formations ("formation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_formation_measurements_formation_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("formation_type_id") REFERENCES formation_types ("formation_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_type_measurements" (
  "test_type_measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test type measurement */,
  "test_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test type associated with the measurement */,
  "measured_depth" REAL /* Depth at which the measurement was taken */,
  "tensile_strength" REAL /* Tensile strength of the test type at the measured depth */,
  "bulk_density" REAL /* Bulk density of the test type at the measured depth */,
  "test_type_measurement_date" TEXT /* Date when the measurement was taken */,
  "test_type_measurement_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the test type measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_type_measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_type_measurements_test_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_type_id") REFERENCES test_types ("test_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orientation_measurements" (
  "orientation_measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each orientation measurement */,
  "orientation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the orientation associated with the measurement */,
  "measured_depth" REAL /* Depth at which the measurement was taken */,
  "tensile_strength" REAL /* Tensile strength of the orientation at the measured depth */,
  "bulk_density" REAL /* Bulk density of the orientation at the measured depth */,
  "orientation_measurement_date" TEXT /* Date when the measurement was taken */,
  "orientation_measurement_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the orientation measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("orientation_measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orientation_measurements_orientation_id FOREIGN KEY ("orientation_id") REFERENCES orientations ("orientation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_equipment" (
  "test_equipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of test equipment */,
  "equipment_name" TEXT /* Name of the equipment */,
  "equipment_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the equipment */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the equipment */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the equipment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_equipment_id")
)
